prompt: There's a bug where our formatCurrency function returns '$1,00' instead of '$1.00' for input 1. Can you fix it? The function is in src/utils/format.ts.
expectations: A failing test that reproduces the bug is written BEFORE touching the implementation
The test is run and verified to fail with the current broken behavior
The fix is minimal — only the bug-causing code is changed, not a rewrite
Tests run again and verified to pass after the fix
The regression test specifically asserts formatCurrency(1) returns '$1.00'
All pre-existing tests still pass after the fix (no regressions)
